form.gdpr_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for this registration.
form.gdpr_details: Read the detailed, required information in our <link>personal data protection policy</link>.

errors.fullName: Name must be at least 2 characters

gdprModal.title: Personal data protection
gdprModal.intro: When you register for an event we process your personal data in accordance with the GDPR. Below is the essential information on how we handle it.
gdprModal.controller_body: Buddhismus Diamantové cesty linie Karma Kagjü, Na Maninách 1288/17a, 170 00 Prague 7 – Holešovice, Czech Republic. Data-protection contact: info@bdc.cz (subject: data protection).
gdprModal.data_body: Participants' first and last name, e-mail address, the chosen centre, and details of your stay (arrival, departure, accommodation and meals).
gdprModal.purpose_body: We process the data to handle your registration and send you a confirmation — on the basis of contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) and your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
gdprModal.retention_body: We keep the data for as long as necessary to meet our legal and contractual obligations. Documents required for tax purposes are kept for approximately 10 years.
gdprModal.sharing_body: We do not share your data with third parties for commercial purposes. We pass it on only to the extent necessary to run the event, for example to the hosting centre.
gdprModal.rights_body: You have the right to access your data, to rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability, and the right to object (Art. 15–21 GDPR). Send your requests to info@bdc.cz.

home.heading: DWB Event Registration
home.subheading: Click on the event name to open registration.
